content:
# 带校验提示的表单

## 使用场景

需要用户填写结构化信息并实时反馈校验结果的表单组件。适用于注册、信息录入、配置编辑等需要输入验证的场景。每个字段下方有错误提示文本区域。

## 布局结构

垂直排列的表单字段组，每组包含：字段标签（label）+ 输入框（rect + text）+ 错误提示文本（红色小字）。字段之间间距 24px。底部有提交按钮。

示例包含 3 个字段：用户名、邮箱（带错误提示）、手机号 + 一个提交按钮。

## 节点树示例

```json
{
  "type": "group",
  "id": "form-validation-root",
  "name": "带校验表单",
  "transform": {
    "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
    "size": { "width": 400, "height": 380 },
    "rotation": 0,
    "opacity": 1
  },
  "zIndex": 0,
  "locked": false,
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-label-username",
      "name": "标签-用户名",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "用户名",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "form-input-username",
      "name": "输入框-用户名",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 28 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 40 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "stroke": { "color": "#d9d9d9", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
      "cornerRadius": 6
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-input-username-value",
      "name": "输入值-用户名",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 12, "y": 38 },
        "size": { "width": 376, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "张三",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-label-email",
      "name": "标签-邮箱",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 92 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "邮箱地址",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "form-input-email",
      "name": "输入框-邮箱(错误状态)",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 120 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 40 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "stroke": { "color": "#FF4D4F", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
      "cornerRadius": 6
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-input-email-value",
      "name": "输入值-邮箱",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 12, "y": 130 },
        "size": { "width": 376, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "invalid-email",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-error-email",
      "name": "错误提示-邮箱",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 164 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 16 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "请输入有效的邮箱地址",
      "style": { "fontSize": 12, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#FF4D4F", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-label-phone",
      "name": "标签-手机号",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 204 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "手机号",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "form-input-phone",
      "name": "输入框-手机号",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 232 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 40 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "stroke": { "color": "#d9d9d9", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
      "cornerRadius": 6
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-input-phone-placeholder",
      "name": "占位文本-手机号",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 12, "y": 242 },
        "size": { "width": 376, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "请输入手机号",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#8C8C8C", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "form-submit-btn-bg",
      "name": "提交按钮背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 308 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 44 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#1677FF" },
      "cornerRadius": 6
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "form-submit-btn-text",
      "name": "提交按钮文本",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 320 },
        "size": { "width": 400, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "提交",
      "style": { "fontSize": 16, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#ffffff", "align": "center", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 设计要点

- 每个字段组由三部分组成：label（14px 黑色）+ input（40px 高，6px 圆角）+ error（12px 红色）
- 正常状态输入框边框 #d9d9d9，错误状态边框变为 #FF4D4F
- 错误提示文本紧跟输入框下方，使用 12px 红色字体 #FF4D4F
- 字段组之间间距 24px（含错误提示空间）
- 占位文本使用 #8C8C8C 次要色
- 提交按钮与最后一个字段间距较大（32px），全宽主色背景

metadata.description: 带校验提示的表单：字段 + 错误提示文本
